nasb.text: It came about when Moses was coming down from Mount Sinai (and the two tablets of the testimony were in Moses’ hand as he was coming down from the mountain), that Moses did not know that the skin of his face shone because of his speaking with Him.

esv.text: When Moses came down from Mount Sinai, with the two tablets of the testimony in his hand as he came down from the mountain, Moses did not know that the skin of his face shone because he had been talking with God.

cnv.text: 摩西從西奈山下來的時候，手裡拿著兩塊法版；摩西從山上下來的時候，不知道自己的臉皮因為與耶和華談過話而發光。

ccb.text: 摩西手里拿着两块约版下西奈山，他不知道自己因为曾与耶和华说话而脸上发光。
